inputs.titre: Bataille de la Boyne en Irlande, soutenue par Louis XIV

reason: The image depicts a battle scene that generally aligns with the historical period of the Battle of the Boyne (1690). Soldiers are shown fighting with swords and what appear to be muskets or spears. Their clothing consists of breeches, tunics, and rough leather elements, consistent with the era. The terrain is muddy and features forests and mountainous regions, matching the landscape of Ireland. There are no obvious signs of modern technology or fantastical elements, contributing to the image's authenticity.
